Package index

All functions

add_era5()
Add ERA5 reference data to a `metamet` object
apply_qc()
Apply Quality Control Checks to Meteorological Data
change_naming_convention()
Change the naming convention of measurement variables
convert_sum_to_rate()
Convert a summed variable to a rate
detect_gaps()
detect_gaps
ggiraph_plot()
ggiraph_plot
impute()
Impute missing values in meteorological data
join()
Join two `metamet` objects
metamet()
Create a `metamet` object from various input types
mm1 mm2 mm3
Example `metamet` objects
network_map()
Create a Leaflet Map of Monitoring Network Sites
pad_data()
pad_data
plot_heatmap_calendar()
plot_heatmap_calendar
polar_map()
Create a Polar Plot Map for a Selected Variable
rbind_metamet()
Combine lists of metamet data tables into a single metamet object
reshape_wide_to_long()
Reshape a metamet object from wide to long format
run_shiny()
Launches the shiny app for the metamet package
subset_by_date()
Subset a `metamet` object by date
time_average()
Time-average a `metamet` object

Developed by Peter Levy.
